title: Artisan Keycap - Molten Lava SA Profile
description: Hand-sculpted and resin-cast artisan keycap in a molten lava colorway with glowing orange swirls over a charcoal base. Cherry MX compatible stem fits most mechanical switches. SA profile, sits great on the Esc or any accent key. Each cap is hand-poured so swirl patterns vary slightly. Sold as a single keycap.
tags: artisan keycap,resin keycap,mechanical keyboard,MX keycap,SA profile,custom keycap,molten lava

title: Artisan Keycap - Deep Ocean Reef Cherry Profile
description: Hand-cast resin artisan keycap with translucent teal and deep blue layers that mimic a coral reef under water, with tiny embedded reef details. Cherry MX compatible stem. Cherry profile R1, perfect as an Escape or novelty key. Each cap is unique. Sold as a single keycap.
tags: artisan keycap,resin keycap,ocean keycap,mechanical keyboard,MX keycap,cherry profile,handmade keycap

title: Custom Keycap Set - Lo-Fi Dusk PBT (104-key)
description: Full 104-key dye-sublimated PBT keycap set in a muted lo-fi dusk palette: dusty lavender alphas, slate mods, and peach accents. Cherry profile, MX compatible, fits full-size and TKL boards. Thick 1.5mm PBT walls resist shine. Made to order in my studio. A calm set for late-night coding sessions.

title: Custom Keycap Set - Terminal Green GMK-style (Full)
description: Doubleshot ABS keycap set in a retro terminal colorway: dark olive base with phosphor-green legends and a sprinkling of amber accent keys. Cherry profile, MX compatible. Crisp, durable legends that never fade. Full kit covers ANSI 60% through full-size. Made to order. A developer favorite.

title: Artisan Keycap - Mini Cassette Novelty Cap
